metadata.title: Freelance Revision Policy Guide | FlowDockr
metadata.description: Build a revision policy that is clear, fair, and enforceable.

hero.title: A strong revision policy protects both you and the client.
hero.description: Use consistent language across proposal, chat, and contract.

usage.label: Guide
usage.title: Problem -> Why -> Solution
usage.description: Standardize your policy so each project starts clean.

items.title: Problem
items.description: Policy language changes each project and creates ambiguity.

items.title: Why it happens
items.description: Freelancers rewrite from scratch under client pressure.

items.title: Solution
items.description: Generate a fixed 4-block scope policy and reuse it consistently.

cta.description: Get the exact wording for client message and contract clause.
